CustomField.description: If checked then the settings button in the dropdown menu of key stakeholder/relationship maps will show based on user permissions. If unchecked this will hide the button regardless of any permissions for users to see the settings button.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If this is unchecked then no users in the org will see the settings button in the key stakeholder/relationship map dropdown menu regardless of what permissions they have set for showing the button. This is org wide.
CustomField.label: Show Chart Settings
